videoSnippet.title: Will The Chess Speak For Itself?
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Huang, Renjie (2516) - Ding, Liren (2734)
(https://lichess.org/broadcast/2026-chinese-team-chess-championship--men/round-5/BUbWhQ68/InpgewWw) [5.5] C47 2026.04.23
C47 Four knights, Scotch, 4...exd4

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Nc3 Nf6 4.d4 exd4 5.Nxd4 Bb4 6.Nxc6 bxc6 7.Bd3 d5 8.exd5 O-O 9.O-O cxd5 10.Qf3 c6 11.h3 Re8 12.Bf4 Bd6 13.Rfe1 Be6 14.Ne2 Bxf4 15.Nxf4 Qb6 16.b3 Bd7 17.Nh5 Nxh5 18.Qxh5 h6 19.Bf5 Bxf5 20.Qxf5 Qa5 21.Rxe8+ Rxe8 22.Kf1 Qa3 23.Re1 Qa6+ 24.Qd3 Rxe1+ 25.Kxe1 Qxa2 26.Qc3 Qa6 27.Qe5 Qa5+ 28.Ke2 Qb5+ 29.Kd2 Qf1 30.Qe8+ Kh7 31.Qxf7 Qxg2 32.h4 Qg6 33.Qxa7 Qf6 34.Qc5 Qxh4 35.Qxc6 Qxf2+ 36.Kd3 Qf3+ 37.Kd2 h5 38.c4 h4 39.cxd5 h3 40.Qc2+ Kh6 41.Qc6+ g6 42.Qa8 Qf2+ 43.Kc3 Qf6+ 44.Kc2 h2
